title: Kaffir Lime Leaf Chicken with Filipino-Style Coconut Rice
description: A flavorful and aromatic dish that combines the brightness of kaffir lime leaves with the richness of coconut rice. This recipe is a twist on traditional Filipino cuisine.
instructions: Heat the coconut oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the onion and garlic and cook until the onion is translucent.
Add the kaffir lime leaves and cook for 1 minute.
Add the chicken breast and cook until browned on both sides.
Add the coconut milk, fish sauce, and sour. Stir to combine.
Bring the mixture to a simmer and cook until the chicken is cooked through.
Serve the chicken over the cooked rice.
Garnish with additional kaffir lime leaves if desired.
